name: Listing Prospect V2
description: Persona B redesigné : scoring grandes écoles (commerce + ingé), signaux jeunesse/alternance, 3 queries ciblées (top schools, jeunes en formation, métiers émergents).

assignments.name: queryPersonaA_FR
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("CEO" OR "Fondateur" OR "CTO" OR "Directeur Général" OR "DG" OR "PDG" OR "Co-fondateur" OR "Président") (startup OR "scale-up" OR SaaS OR fintech OR ETI OR "deep tech" OR IA) (France OR Belgique OR Suisse OR Luxembourg OR Canada)

assignments.name: queryPersonaA_EU
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("CEO" OR "Founder" OR "CTO" OR "Managing Director" OR "Co-founder") (startup OR "scale-up" OR SaaS OR AI OR tech) (Germany OR Spain OR Netherlands OR Italy OR UK OR Sweden OR Denmark OR Norway OR "Czech Republic" OR Poland OR Ukraine OR Georgia OR Iceland OR Austria OR Portugal OR Romania OR Finland OR "United States" OR "New York" OR California OR Texas OR Florida)

assignments.name: queryPersonaA_INTL
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("CEO" OR "Founder" OR "CTO" OR "Managing Director" OR "Co-founder") (startup OR "scale-up" OR SaaS OR AI OR fintech OR tech) (Morocco OR UAE OR Dubai OR Qatar OR Oman OR Singapore OR Australia OR India OR Indonesia OR "Hong Kong" OR "Côte d'Ivoire" OR Senegal)

assignments.name: queryPersonaB_SCHOOL
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("HEC Paris" OR "ESSEC" OR "ESCP" OR "Polytechnique" OR "CentraleSupélec" OR "Mines Paris" OR "Telecom Paris" OR "EDHEC" OR "SKEMA" OR "emlyon") (data OR growth OR digital OR GTM OR IA OR transformation) France

assignments.name: queryPersonaB_YOUNG
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in (alternant OR étudiant OR junior OR "chef de projet") (INSA OR Epitech OR "EM Lyon" OR EDHEC OR "Grenoble EM" OR Kedge OR NEOMA OR Efrei) (data OR digital OR growth OR transformation) France

assignments.name: queryPersonaB_EMERGING
assignments.value: site:linkedin.com/in ("chef de projet" OR "data analyst" OR "transformation digitale" OR "business developer" OR consultant) (luxe OR retail OR fintech OR sport OR "scale-up" OR startup) France

assignments.name: fixedNote
assignments.value: Fraichement arrivé sur Paris pour passer quelque années à construire ma carrière après des belles années à surfer autour du globe. Juste là pour étoffer mon cercle. Au plaisir de suivre vos activités

parameters.subject: ={{ "Prospects LinkedIn " + $json.dateStr + " — Liste complète " + $json.totalProfiles + " profils (KDM: " + $json.personaACount + " | Community: " + $json.personaBCount + " | Score moy: " + $json.avgScore + "/10)" }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

Bonjour Victor,

Fichier cumulatif mis à jour — " + $json.totalProfiles + " profils total au " + $json.dateStr + " :

  • KDM : " + $json.personaACount + "
  • Community : " + $json.personaBCount + "
  • Score ICP moyen : " + $json.avgScore + "/10

CSV complet en pièce jointe (tous les runs, dédoublonnés).

" }}
